problem id: 37c94738
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHR(1)

examples:
  11011001 -> 00100000
  00011100 -> 00001000
  10010011 -> 00000001
  11010010 -> 00100001
  01011100 -> 00101000
  01000100 -> 00000000
  01110001 -> 00100000
  01111011 -> 00110100

query: 11001100
predicted answer: 00000000
